name: MGM-4A "Quaoar"
description: The Quaoar is an industrial-scale microgravity mining platform. Its primary excavation system couples a 30 kW fiber laser array with a downstream plasma-assist stage that dissociates refractory oxides on the fly, enabling extraction of metallic iron, nickel, and platinum-group elements directly from the excavation stream. A robotic tether-management system continuously repositions 12 anchor legs across the working face to distribute reaction forces. Designed for extended-duration campaigns on metal-rich M-type asteroids and trans-Neptunian object surface operations.
